materialChanges: Grounded the opening in an explicitly fictional fixed-volume training-pump calculation and replaced the near-duplicate table transfer with a non-tabular microscope-calibration task that composes inverse and square scaling.
Rebuilt the smooth-pattern misconception into prediction, neutral shortcut, invariant test, repair, and recheck stages, and added an instruction to attempt practice before reading adjacent feedback.

Narrowed the parameterization objective to exact-data recovery and evaluation of supplied approximate-data candidates; removed the unsupported general dimensional claim for k and its assessment criterion.

Narrowed model-checking claims and assessment cautions to variation, assumptions, residuals, algebraic domain, and causation boundaries supported by the retained NIST sources; removed unsupported interpolation and extrapolation scoring.

Added scene-orientation and scene-worked-example to the model-checking claim map, completed their learner-visible source notes, and aligned all scene claim and source coverage after the transfer revision.

Removed learner-visible internal curriculum language, reduced the declared scene total from 240 to 90 minutes, and updated originality and governance wording in ATTRIBUTION.md without changing lesson identity, version, status, references, or frozen reviews.

reviewDispositions.rationale: The objective now promises exponent and constant recovery only from exact data and evaluation of a supplied candidate against approximate observations. Existing exact-data items assess recovery, while the approximate inverse dataset assesses a supplied candidate; no noisy-data fitting method is implied.

The unsupported observed-domain and interpolation/extrapolation claims and scoring were removed. The retained model-checking claim is limited to structure, residual mismatch, variation, and assumptions, and it now maps scene-orientation and scene-worked-example with both NIST model-checking sources exposed in their source notes.

Rather than add an unreviewed dimensional-analysis source, the revision removes the general units-of-k teaching claim from the concept, objective, worked example, synthesis, glossary, assessment prompt, answer, and rubric. Concrete contexts retain ordinary variable units without assessing a general dimensional rule for k.
The two-point formula now requires positive responses, distinct positive inputs x1 and x2, and one consistent valid logarithm base, which excludes the zero denominator caused by x2/x1 = 1.

This note independently confirmed the candidate's numerical answer logic. The retained calculations were rechecked; the revised exact-point answer remains p = 2 and k = 4.5, and the new microscope calculation gives w = 0.40 mm and A = 0.16 square millimetres at M = 60.

The first read now begins with a concrete, unit-bearing fixed-volume pump training setup and explicitly explains why inverse scaling matters. The transfer uses a fictional microscope calibration. Both are bounded as idealized mathematical contexts rather than uncited biomedical laws or clinical guidance.

The misconception scene now elicits a commitment, names the tempting shortcut neutrally, tests direct and inverse invariants, states the repaired rule, and ends with a fresh discriminating recheck plus feedback.

The transfer no longer repeats the worked square-law table. It requires translating a verbal inverse calibration, parameterizing it, composing it with square geometry to derive exponent -2, predicting in millimetres and square millimetres, and identifying the assumptions on which the result depends.
The concept opening no longer mentions the science block or other internal curriculum organization; it defines the lesson's narrow quantitative use of model directly in learner-facing language.

Practice now begins with a format-neutral instruction to cover or skip past each feedback block and commit to an answer before comparing methods. No raw HTML or renderer-specific disclosure control was introduced.
The seven scene estimates now total 90 minutes instead of 240, with 10 to 15 minutes assigned to each concise scene.

evidenceChecked: All seven scenes retain one level-one heading, semantic source order, headings no deeper than level three, ordinary Markdown tables and lists, and balanced allowlisted directives.

Essential relationships are expressed in prose, equations, coordinates, and tables; no outcome depends on color, image position, audio, hover, drag, animation, or timing, and the microscope area result is also stated in words as square millimetres.

Practice and misconception prompts give a non-interactive cover-or-skip route before feedback; assessment remains untimed, retakeable, text-response based, and configured for feedback after an attempt.

Every mapped material claim appears in the same scene's learner-visible source note with all attached source IDs; claim, scene, source, glossary, objective, rubric, and assessment links were checked for internal consistency.

references.json contains three allowed reference-work records with factual-reference and facts-only-original-expression uses, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found observations, terms URLs, concise license statements, and no human-only source.

ATTRIBUTION.md identifies the accountable principal, CC BY 4.0 status, original author-agent provenance, original fictional examples, facts-only source use, and the location of review and finalization provenance.
lesson.json declares no third-party assets, and the pack contains no local media or dataset requiring separate redistribution rights, attribution, captions, metadata stripping, or privacy review.

The revised scenes contain no raw HTML or entities, scripts, styles, frames, remote embeds, executable code, unsafe URL schemes, active SVG, personal or patient data, credentials, or unsafe TeX commands.
The pump and microscope contexts are expressly fictional or idealized and state that they are not device, laboratory, clinical, specimen, or patient-care guidance.
limitations: No rendered browser, screen-reader, keyboard, 200 percent zoom, reflow, print, or export test was performed; the audit covers canonical source structure and equivalent text paths.

The finalizer did not make live network requests to recheck NIST URLs, terms, robots state, or source content; the audit relies on the dated reference ledger and the academic review's disclosed direct source check.

Per the operator's scope restriction, site schemas and quorum JSON were not opened, and npm source preflight and repository validation were not run. JSON parsing, manifest arithmetic, answer-string types, rubric totals, reference field constraints, cross-links, source-note coverage, Markdown safety, and whitespace checks passed locally.
The final content commit does not yet exist, so finalCommit remains the operator-required literal placeholder until the revision is committed.

rationale: The original candidate teaching files were unchanged after commit 8937fc68ead59668e6795efb56311f66a367895c except for the two committed advisory reviews. The eligible record comprises exactly one academic and one learning-design request-changes input for that candidate, with distinct disclosed run IDs and providers and operator-supplied non-dismissed COMMENTED transports. Those disclosures establish the policy snapshot only as attested metadata, not verified independence. Every indexed finding is disposed above, all major concerns are resolved in one coherent bounded revision, the revised mathematics and assessment logic were recomputed, and the source-level accessibility-and-rights audit is satisfied. The specific suggestion to replace the lesson throughout with named biomedical laws was not followed because doing so would add unreviewed empirical claims; the underlying grounding concern was resolved with original, explicitly idealized training contexts. Subject to the procedural conditions below, no credible academic, instructional, accessibility, rights, privacy, security, or provenance blocker remains, so merge is the appropriate content decision.
dissent: The learning-design review proposed refactoring all text around named physiological or pharmacological laws. The finalizer agrees with the need for concrete grounding but instead uses an idealized fixed-volume pump and a supplied fictional microscope calibration, avoiding unsupported clinical or empirical claims while preserving the quantitative outcome.
conditions: The operator must commit the finalized lesson content with both cited review artifacts present, replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT with that exact 40-character SHA, and make no further teaching-content change after the recorded final commit.

Before merge, the operator must run the repository's required strict source preflight, schema validation, and full verification gates that were explicitly excluded from this run; any failure remains merge-blocking.
After adjudication, the maintainer may make only the separately authorized publication transition to lesson status, source confidence, and retained claim review-status fields.

adjudicator.displayName: VSBDev — accountable operator, fresh finalizer and adjudicator role
